backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a financial record management system with CRUD operations (add, get, delete) and date-based sorting for income/expense records stored in a Map.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: record input form, sortable records table, financial summary calculations, and warm earth-tone UI design with their associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of seven frontend files describing the React components, hooks, and styling that implement the finance tracker UI with warm earth tones and full CRUD functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space with neutral grayscale values and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Finance Tracker React application with viewport meta tag and root div mounting point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component orchestrating the finance tracker layout with header, FinancialSummary, RecordForm, RecordsTable sections, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/FinancialSummary: React component displaying three cards with calculated total income, total expenses, and net balance from financial records with color-coded indicators and loading states.
frontend/src/components/RecordForm.tsx: React form component with date picker, description input, amount input, and category selector for adding new financial records with validation and error handling.
frontend/src/components/RecordsTable.tsx: React table component displaying financial records with formatted dates and amounts, category badges, delete buttons with confirmation dialog, and empty state handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages an ICP actor instance using Internet Identity authentication, automatically invalidating and refetching dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Custom React Query hooks for managing financial records, providing functions to fetch all records, add new records, and delete records with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom warm earth tone color system (terracotta, sage, cream) for both light and dark modes, including CSS variables for UI components and typography.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom warm earth tone colors, OKLCH color system, typography settings, animations, and responsive container configurations.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features (frontend form, sortable table, financial calculations, warm earth tone UI) and pending backend requirements (data model, CRUD functions) for a finance record-keeping application.
